title: Joe.jar
description: the horror mod, that it's lorific!
body:
The horror mod, that has an interesting lore, but simple! The mod created by a unexperienced youtuber called The Glitched CUbe, this project it's a big one.
The mod includes
- Joe_jar
- smoker girl
- vaper
- damian deforment dimension
- heart of joe
- biome
